sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Nio's in-house chip production exceeds 550,000 units, says William Li
feed.summary: Nio's cumulative in-house chip production has surpassed 550,000 units, significantly driven by their Yangjian LiDAR chip and Shenji NX9031 smart driving chip. This initiative has led to substantial cost savings per vehicle and improved performance, validating Nio's strategy of investing in R&D for higher long-term gross margins. The company aims to standardize automotive chips and expects 35-40% of its automotive semiconductors to be domestically sourced by 2027.

feed.title: Axogen chief innovation officer DeVinney sells $171k in shares
feed.summary: Axogen's Chief Innovation Officer, Erick Wayne DeVinney, sold 5,221 shares of common stock for approximately $171,457 and disposed of 2,870 shares to cover tax obligations. Despite the stock's recent retreat, analysts maintain a bullish outlook with price targets between $39 and $43. The company also recently surpassed Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Ma Botao details 16.8M Class B stake in Zhibao (NASDAQ: ZBAO)
feed.summary: Zhibao Technology Inc.'s CEO and director, Ma Botao, has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) disclosing an indirect stake of 16,816,692 Class B ordinary shares. These shares are held through various entities including Mavy Holdings Limited, Shenbao Limited Partnership, Shanghai Xinhui Investment Consulting Co., Ltd., and Maximum Global Holdings Limited. Ma Botao is considered a major shareholder, with voting and dispositive power over these holdings.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Names New Head of Global Retirement Team
feed.summary: Jessica Sclafani has been named the new head of T. Rowe Price Group Inc.’s retirement strategist team, succeeding Michael Davis, who is retiring on May 1. Sclafani joined T. Rowe Price in 2022 and will lead the expanded global retirement team leadership, which also includes Richard Parkin for U.K. retirement and Scott Keller for Americas, APAC, and EMEA distribution. Davis, who joined in 2016 and led the global retirement strategy team, is celebrated for his significant contributions to the firm's retirement business.

feed.title: Pinnacle Financial (PNFP) Joins Prestigious Bank Index
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial (PNFP) is being added to the KBW Nasdaq Bank Index, signifying its strong growth and strong performance in the financial sector. The company, operating through Pinnacle Bank, boasts consistent revenue growth, efficient operations, and an attractive valuation with its P/E ratio near a 2-year low. Despite some inherent sector risks, its robust financial health, confirmed by a high Piotroski F-Score and positive insider buying trends, indicates a promising outlook.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) Shares Down 1.4% - Here's Why
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) shares dropped 1.4% during mid-day trading to $280.35, with trading volume significantly lower than average. Despite the dip, the company reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates for EPS and revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend of $2.21. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus of "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $372.13.

feed.title: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) Stock Price Up 1.2% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) saw its stock price rise 1.2% on Thursday, closing at $154.6950, with trading volume down 28% from average. Despite CEO Ernie Herrman selling 30,000 shares, analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating with an average target price of $167.55, reflecting institutional ownership of over 91%. The company recently beat Q4 earnings estimates and provided strong FY2027 guidance.

feed.title: Monopoly? Not a Chance, Says Live Nation’s Chief at Antitrust Trial.
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino defended his company against accusations of monopolistic practices in an antitrust trial. He countered claims that Live Nation uses anti-competitive tactics to dominate the live entertainment industry, emphasizing the company's vertically integrated business model and its efforts to create a successful framework for artists and itself. The trial, initially brought by the Justice Department, is now being pursued by a coalition of states dissatisfied with a recent settlement.

feed.title: Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) Insider Sells 18,667 Shares
feed.summary: Incyte insider Pablo Cagnoni sold 18,667 shares of the company's stock for approximately $1.76 million, reducing his stake by 7.36%. The transaction occurred on March 17th, with shares sold at an average price of $94.24. Despite the insider sale, institutions like Vanguard, AQR, and Invesco have increased their positions in Incyte, which has a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $103.44.

feed.title: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) CFO Sells $252,000.00 in Stock
feed.summary: MSCI CFO Andrew Wiechmann sold 450 shares of the company's stock for $252,000 on March 17th, decreasing his stake by 1.96%. The sale followed MSCI's strong Q4 earnings, where the company beat analyst estimates with EPS of $4.66 and revenue of $822.5 million, leading to a raised quarterly dividend. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating on MSCI with an average price target of $674.

feed.title: Todd Kelsey Sells 1,500 Shares of Plexus (NASDAQ:PLXS) Stock
feed.summary: Plexus (NASDAQ:PLXS) CEO Todd Kelsey sold 1,500 shares of the company's stock on March 18th at an average price of $194.24, totaling $291,360. This transaction reduced his ownership by 1.8% to 81,791 shares. The company recently reported strong Q1 results, with EPS of $1.78 beating estimates and revenue up 9.6% year-over-year, and has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts.

feed.title: Mexico’s culture ministry urges eBay to halt sales of pre-Hispanic artefacts
feed.summary: Mexico's culture ministry has requested eBay remove listings for 195 pre-Hispanic archaeological objects and return them to Mexico, arguing their sale is illegal and they are part of Mexico's cultural heritage. The US-based seller claims the items were legally acquired with provenance, stating that international treaties are not retroactive. eBay states it does not allow illegal sales and is investigating the flagged listings.

feed.title: A Look At Perdoceo Education (PRDO) Valuation After Strong Growth Outlook And Positive Analyst Sentiment
feed.summary: Perdoceo Education (PRDO) has shown strong share price momentum and positive analyst sentiment, partly due to solid quarterly revenue growth and a constructive 2026 outlook. The company is considered undervalued by 18.4%, with a fair value of $42 per share, driven by expectations of continued expansion in high-demand programs and flexible learning options. However, this valuation relies on enrollment and margin assumptions, and potential regulatory or funding shifts could challenge the outlook.

feed.title: A Look At ONEOK (OKE) Valuation After Revenue Shortfall And Cautious 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: ONEOK (OKE) recently reported a fourth-quarter revenue shortfall and a cautious 2026 outlook, leading to analyst downgrades, despite a higher dividend and reduced long-term debt. The stock is currently trading near its analyst price target of $87.30, indicating it is slightly undervalued, with future performance dependent on execution and capital allocation. The article emphasizes reviewing the complete narrative and associated risks to make an informed investment decision.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Doubling Down On Ethics And Farmer Resilience
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) has been recognized as one of the World’s Most Ethical Companies and has committed US$500,000 to support farmer resilience through American Farmland Trust. These actions, alongside a recent SEC settlement and DOJ investigation closure, aim to strengthen ADM's ethical and sustainable profile. While these efforts bolster ADM's investment narrative around resilience, investors are still focused on biofuel policy clarity and potential margin pressures in its core Ag Services & Oilseeds segment.

feed.title: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) executive awarded new stock options and shares
feed.summary: AMETEK executive Thomas C. Marecic, President – Electronic Instruments, received new equity awards comprising stock options on 3,930 shares at an exercise price of $212.77 and 1,240 restricted shares. To cover taxes, 253 shares were withheld, which is treated as a disposition but not an open-market sale. Following these transactions, Marecic directly owns 45,533 shares, with additional holdings in a 401(k) plan and through his wife.

feed.title: Progyny (PGNY) Chief Product Officer has RSU shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Progyny, Inc.'s Chief Product Officer, Geoffrey Clapp, reported a tax-related disposition of 3,275 common shares on March 17, 2026. These shares, valued at $17.42 each, were withheld to cover taxes upon the vesting of restricted stock units. Following this event, Clapp directly holds 60,647 shares of Progyny common stock.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $1.02 a Share, Payable June 11 to Holders of Record May 29
feed.summary: T-Mobile US has announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $1.02 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 11 to shareholders who are on record as of May 29, 2026. This announcement confirms the consistency of T-Mobile's dividend payout for the upcoming quarter.

feed.title: Ametek (NYSE: AME) CFO granted 11,960 options and new shares
feed.summary: AMETEK's Executive VP and CFO, Dalip Puri, received equity compensation including 11,960 stock options with an exercise price of $212.77 per share and 3,780 shares of common stock. After tax withholdings, Puri now directly holds 11,832 shares of common stock. These awards are part of the company's 2020 Omnibus Incentive Compensation Plan and align executive incentives with company performance.

feed.title: Nathan's Famous Inc Stock (ISIN: US6311001050) Holds Steady Amid Hot Dog Season Optimism and Franchi
feed.summary: Nathan's Famous Inc. (ISIN: US6311001050) is showing resilience in a volatile consumer market, attracting European investor interest due to its strong franchise growth and upcoming summer demand. The company's asset-light franchise model, characterized by high margins and steady royalty inflows, positions it as a defensive play in the restaurant sector, offering a unique investment opportunity with stable cash flows and dividends. Despite potential risks like over-reliance on a single product and geopolitical factors, the outlook points to mid-single-digit royalty growth and a consistent dividend track record.

feed.title: Viavi Solutions shares rise on cybersecurity product launch and RSAC positioning
feed.summary: Viavi Solutions (VIAV) shares rose 4.9% today following the launch of its new cybersecurity product, Observer Threat Forensics. The offering, designed for retrospective investigation across various telemetry types, emphasizes enterprise security visibility and incident response. The company plans live demonstrations at the upcoming RSA Conference 2026, which is contributing to investor attention.

feed.title: VP Mayer sells CF Industries (CF) stock worth $187,035
feed.summary: Erik M. Mayer, VP at CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CF), sold 1,500 shares of company stock for $187,035 on March 17, 2026. This transaction follows strong Q4 results for CF Industries, driven by low natural gas prices, leading BofA Securities to raise its price target to $86 while maintaining an Underperform rating. However, Mizuho downgraded the stock to Underperform with a $100 price target, citing concerns that recent gains due to rising oil and fertilizer prices might be overdone.

feed.title: Origin Materials Enacts One-for-Thirty Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: Origin Materials (ORGN) has implemented a one-for-thirty reverse stock split, effective March 19, 2026, to reduce its outstanding share count and increase its per-share trading price. This action is intended to help the company maintain Nasdaq listing standards and potentially enhance investor appeal. Despite this, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates ORGN as "Underperform" due to weak financial performance and bearish technical indicators.

feed.title: Bunge Global Raises $1.2 Billion Through Senior Notes
feed.summary: Bunge Global has successfully raised $1.2 billion through the sale of senior unsecured notes, split into $500 million due in 2033 and $700 million due in 2036. The net proceeds of $1.19 billion will be used for general corporate purposes, including debt repayment, working capital, and investments. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates BG as Neutral, citing weaker profitability and leverage step-up balanced by strong bullish price momentum and a constructive earnings outlook.

feed.title: Orion Group (ORN) Secures Contracts Exceeding $125 Million
feed.summary: Orion Group Holdings (ORN) has secured over $125 million in new contracts and change orders, demonstrating strong operational capabilities. The company will also participate in the 38th Annual Roth Conference to engage with various industry stakeholders. With a market cap of $412.45 million, Orion Group specializes in marine and concrete construction services across North America and the Caribbean, though its financial health shows modest profitability and some liquidity challenges.

feed.title: News10NBC Investigates: Humana drops Rochester Home Care Companies from its network
feed.summary: Humana Medicare Advantage has dropped most Rochester home care providers from its network, causing panic among families and concern within the local healthcare system. Patients like Chris Thompson, a double amputee with chronic conditions, are now facing denials for essential home care services they previously relied on. Both UR Medicine Home Care and HCR Home Care confirm they are out of network with Humana and are working towards a resolution, while Humana has yet to offer details or solutions to affected policyholders.

feed.title: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) president receives new stock options and restricted shares
feed.summary: AMETEK's President – Electromechanical, David F. Hermance, received equity compensation including 3,930 stock options and 1,240 restricted common shares. These awards were granted under the AMETEK, Inc. 2020 Omnibus Incentive Compensation Plan at an exercise price of $212.77 per share. Following these transactions, Hermance directly holds 42,978 common shares, with additional indirect holdings through a 401(k) plan and SERP units.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) CEO exercises options, sells 60,165 shares while retaining stake
feed.summary: Patrick Dumont, Chairman and CEO of Las Vegas Sands (LVS), exercised options to acquire 61,740 shares at $52.53 each and subsequently sold 60,165 shares at a weighted average price of $54.75. This "exercise-and-sell" transaction increased his direct holdings to 511,942 shares, indicating a routine compensation-related activity rather than a strong directional signal on the company's prospects. The filing shows no remaining derivative position from this specific option grant after the transaction.

feed.title: FedEx Earnings Report: Q3 Profit Surpasses Analyst Projections - News and Statistics
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. reported a strong fiscal third quarter, with net income reaching $1.06 billion and adjusted earnings of $5.25 per share, significantly surpassing analyst expectations of $4.14 per share. The company also exceeded revenue forecasts, reporting $24 billion for the quarter. FedEx provided a full fiscal year earnings per share outlook, indicating continued positive momentum.

feed.title: T-Mobile investors get next $1.02-a-share dividend on June 11
feed.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a cash dividend of $1.02 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 11, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 29, 2026. The company, known as the supercharged Un-carrier, continues to leverage its 5G network and unique value proposition.

feed.title: Visa, Mastercard and American Express Have Gotten Roughed Up. The Case for Buying the Dip.
feed.summary: This article discusses the recent downturn experienced by major credit card companies Visa, Mastercard, and American Express. It argues that despite the rough patch, this could present a buying opportunity for investors. Mastercard's development in stablecoin capabilities is highlighted as a relevant factor.

feed.title: CarMax Announces Fourth Quarter Conference Call
feed.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) will report its fourth-quarter financial results for the period ending February 28, 2026, before market open on April 14, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET featuring key executives to discuss these results. A live audio webcast and replay will be available on the investors.carmax.com website.

feed.title: Origin Materials Stock Slides On 1-For-30 Reverse Stock Split
feed.summary: Origin Materials (NASDAQ: ORGN) shares are trading lower after the company announced a one-for-30 reverse stock split. The split, approved by shareholders and the board, became effective on Thursday, with shares set to begin trading on a split-adjusted basis on Friday. Warrants will also require 30 warrants for one common stock share.

feed.title: Target (TGT) CAO sells 2,053 shares and acquires deferred stock units
feed.summary: Target Corp's Chief Accounting Officer, Matthew A. Liegel, sold 2,053 shares of Target common stock for $117.1911 per share in an open-market transaction. Concurrently, he acquired 2,112.1249 deferred compensation units, which are economically equivalent to Target shares but are cash-settled unsecured obligations of the company. These transactions are seen as routine compensation management, reallocating compensation and equity exposure rather than indicating a significant directional bet.

feed.title: One Stop Systems (NASDAQ:OSS) Price Target Raised to $12.00
feed.summary: Lake Street Capital has increased its price target for One Stop Systems (NASDAQ:OSS) to $12.00 from $9.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, following the company's strong Q4 results that exceeded expectations. Despite beating revenue and EPS estimates and reporting a record gross margin, OSS shares dipped on the news. The company's performance was boosted by defense contract wins and a significant divestiture, though analysts note that consistent long-term profitability remains a key factor for sustained investor confidence.

feed.title: Alalah Nouri (NASDAQ: PRCT) files Form 144 to sell vested RSUs
feed.summary: Alalah Nouri, an affiliate of PROCEPT BioRobotics Corp (NASDAQ: PRCT), has filed a Form 144 notice indicating a proposed sale of company common stock derived from RSU vesting. The filing details proposed sales of 2,820, 1,996, and 547 shares linked to RSU vesting dates in March 2026 and also notes a prior sale of 3,243 shares on March 10, 2026. This informational filing notifies market regulators of planned dispositions of vested RSUs, with compliance dependent on Rule 144 conditions.

feed.title: YieldMax’s PYPY Riding PayPal All The Way Down
feed.summary: YieldMax PYPL Option Income Strategy ETF (PYPY) aims to generate weekly income by selling covered calls on PayPal (PYPL) stock. However, PayPal's stock has declined significantly due to missed earnings and a weak outlook, eroding PYPY's net asset value and compressing its distribution amounts. This performance suggests that PYPY's income stream is unsustainable unless PayPal's growth improves, as the fund is increasingly returning investor principal rather than earned premiums.

feed.title: Pinnacle Financial Partners joins the KBW Nasdaq Bank Index (BKX)
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners has joined the KBW Nasdaq Bank Index (BKX), signifying its growth and strong performance among leading financial institutions. This move places Pinnacle among a select group of publicly traded banks globally recognized for scale and strong returns, moving up from the KBW Nasdaq Regional Banking Index. Pinnacle's CFO, Jamie Gregory, highlighted this as a significant milestone, reinforcing the bank's relationship-driven model and its consistent growth.

feed.title: From regional to top-bank index: Pinnacle Financial moves into BKX
feed.summary: Pinnacle Financial Partners (NYSE: PNFP) is joining the KBW Nasdaq Bank Index (BKX), moving up from the KBW Nasdaq Regional Banking Index. This inclusion recognizes Pinnacle's significant growth, strong performance, and scale among leading financial institutions, positioning it alongside some of the largest and most influential banking institutions in the country. The company attributes this achievement to its relationship-driven model and strong client loyalty, further solidifying its presence as Tennessee's largest bank headquartered there and Georgia's largest bank holding company.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Corp. stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Fair Isaac Corp. (FICO) stock underperformed on Thursday compared to its competitors. Shares fell 1.63% to $1277.67, while the S&P 500 rose 0.86%. This performance followed a mixed period for the company, as its stock previously closed at a record high but then experienced a decline.

feed.title: Eversource Energy stock underperforms Thursday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: Eversource Energy's stock fell on Thursday, underperforming its competitors. This decline happened on a generally positive trading day for the stock market.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC's stock (STX) saw a 2.40% gain, closing at $98.12, which outperformed both its competitors and the broader market on a strong trading day. While the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average also rose, Seagate's stock still lagged behind its 52-week high.

feed.title: Chipotle to open Friday
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill is opening its first Farmville location on Friday, March 20, at 2004 South Main St. The new restaurant will feature a "Chipotlane" drive-thru for digital orders, new menu items like Chicken al Pastor and a high protein menu, and a Chipotle U Rewards program for college students. Chipotle is also hiring around 30 employees for the new location.

feed.title: OPKO Health (OPK) appoints former CFO Subbarao Uppaluri to board
feed.summary: OPKO Health, Inc. has appointed Subbarao V. Uppaluri, Ph.D., its former Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, to its Board of Directors as an independent director, effective March 18, 2026. Dr. Uppaluri will fill a vacancy left by the passing of Dr. Richard Krasno and is expected to join the Compensation Committee. The board determined Uppaluri meets independence criteria from the SEC and Nasdaq, and there are no related-party transactions to disclose.

feed.title: PROCEPT BioRobotics (PRCT) CLO sells 304 shares to cover RSU taxes
feed.summary: PROCEPT BioRobotics' Chief Legal Officer, Alaleh Nouri, sold 304 shares of common stock at $28.1532 per share. This sale was explicitly made to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units. After this transaction, Nouri still holds 110,717 shares, indicating this was a minor, tax-related adjustment rather than a discretionary reduction in her holdings.

feed.title: Precision Trading with Forum Energy Technologies Inc. (FET) Risk Zones
feed.summary: This article provides a precision trading analysis for Forum Energy Technologies Inc. (FET), highlighting positive near-term sentiment while noting a weak mid-term bias within a long-term strength context. It details specific institutional trading strategies including position trading, momentum breakout, and risk hedging, complete with entry zones, targets, and stop losses. The analysis also includes multi-timeframe signal strengths, support, and resistance levels to guide trading decisions.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino, defending his company, takes star role at antitrust trial
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino testified in an antitrust trial, defending his company against claims of greed and customer abuse. Rapino addressed issues such as controversial employee messages, the 2022 Taylor Swift ticket sales problems, and policies regarding lawn chairs and Adele's ticketing. The trial stems from a lawsuit brought by the U.S. Justice Department and continued by 33 states and the District of Columbia despite federal settlements.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE: Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Class Action – Company Announcement - FT.com
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP announced a securities class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. Investors who purchased ENPH securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, have until April 20, 2026, to seek appointment as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges Enphase Energy made false or misleading statements regarding its channel inventory management, ability to mitigate effects of the 25D Credit termination, and overall financial prospects, leading to a significant stock price drop.

feed.title: Prospect Capital (PSEC) files Post‑Effective Amendment No.5 with exhibits
feed.summary: Prospect Capital Corporation (PSEC) has filed a Post-Effective Amendment No. 5 to its Form N-2 registration statement, which became effective immediately upon filing. This amendment includes an updated list of consolidated financial statements and a comprehensive schedule of exhibits, featuring numerous supplemental indentures and note forms. The filing clarifies that it does not alter other parts of the original registration statement, and its impact is primarily procedural, serving as reference material for the company's debt securities.

feed.title: FedEx Lifts Profit Outlook as Network Plan Gains Traction
feed.summary: FedEx has raised its full-year profit forecast, signaling confidence in its delivery network restructuring despite global economic pressures from the war in Iran and rising energy costs. The company now expects adjusted earnings of $19.30 to $20.10 per share for the fiscal year, surpassing analyst estimates. This optimistic outlook indicates FedEx's resilience as it proceeds with combining its express air-freight and ground-delivery operations, with the planned freight unit spinoff still on track for June.
